teamsPage.title: Teams & coverage
teamsPage.description: Create showroom or field teams, add reps, and set a primary team so pipeline leads and Quick Add sales stay organized.
teamsPage.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from {team}? They can be added again later.
teamsPage.deleteTeamConfirm: Permanently delete team “{name}”? Members are removed from this team; sales rows on this team are unlinked (team cleared). This cannot be undone.
